title: Medical Care Expense Assistance * Women - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Medical Care Expense Assistance * Women 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Breast Cancer Cancer Cervical Cancer Stillbirth Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Educates, identifies, and assists women in accessing mammogram vouchers. Provides care coordination and navigation of ScreenWise services. 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Women age 40 and older who have not had a mammogram in the past year or at all ScreenWise services: Women age 50 and older and needing breast or cervical cancer screening or diagnostic services. Must have a household income at or below 250% of Federal Poverty Level, and must either have no health insurance or have health insurance, but not enough to cover their needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM
